import PageExample from '@site/src/components/PageExample';
import { NewsArticlePage } from '@ethds/templates';

<PageExample>
  <NewsArticlePage
    serviceName="Government of Ethiopia"
    languages={[{ code: 'en', label: 'English' }]}
    locale="en"
    onLocale={() => {}}
    breadcrumb={[
      { label: 'Home', href: '/' },
      { label: 'News', href: '/news' },
      { label: 'New office hours starting Meskerem' },
    ]}
    title="New office hours starting Meskerem"
    date="Meskerem 1, 2019 EC"
    body={<p>Government offices will open at 8:00 AM instead of 8:30 AM starting next month, to reduce queues.</p>}
    newsHref="/news"
    footerGroups={[{ title: 'About', links: [{ label: 'Accessibility', href: '/accessibility' }] }]}
    copyright="© 2026 Government of Ethiopia."
  />
</PageExample>

The single-article half of the News Page template — one `<h1>` (the
article title); plain, readable text over heavy media, respecting
low-bandwidth connections. See also
[News Page — Listing](news-listing-page), which links to pages like this
one.

```tsx
import { NewsArticlePage } from '@ethds/templates';

<NewsArticlePage
  serviceName="Government of Ethiopia"
  languages={languages}
  locale="en"
  onLocale={(code) => { /* … */ }}
  breadcrumb={breadcrumb}
  title="New office hours starting Meskerem"
  date="Meskerem 1, 2019 EC" // already formatted per the Ethiopian calendar
  body={<p>…</p>}
  newsHref="/news"
/>
```

## When to use this template

Use this for each individual announcement, linked from
[News Page — Listing](news-listing-page).

## Accessibility & localization

- One `<h1>` (the article title); the date renders in a real `<time>`
  element.
- The breadcrumb names Home, News, and the article title, so a citizen
  always knows where they are.
- `title`, `body`, and the breadcrumb are all translated content.

## Plain HTML

A real `<time datetime="…">` for the date, reusing
[Breadcrumb](/docs/components/breadcrumb#plain-html)'s markup. See the
[template's own HTML Example](https://github.com/yidnekachewkibru/ethgov-design-system/blob/main/packages/ethds-templates/templates/news-page.md#html-example)
(the "Article" half) for the full page.

## Props

| Prop | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|
| `serviceName` | `ReactNode` | Yes |
| `nav` | `HeaderNavItem[]` | No |
| `languages` | `LanguageOption[]` | Yes |
| `locale` | `string` | Yes |
| `onLocale` | `(code: string) => void` | Yes |
| `breadcrumb` | `BreadcrumbItem[]` | Yes |
| `title` | `ReactNode` | Yes |
| `date` | `string` | Yes |
| `body` | `ReactNode` | Yes |
| `newsHref` | `string` | Yes |
| `footerGroups` | `FooterLinkGroup[]` | No |
| `copyright` | `ReactNode` | No |
| `labels` | `Partial<NewsArticlePageLabels>` | No |
